message.content:
Test the signup and login flows on https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app using Playwright.

Steps to test:

1. First, go to the signup page at https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/signup
2. Take a screenshot of the signup page
3. Fill in the form:
   - Full Name: "Test User"
   - Email: "testuser@nexusai-test.com"
   - Password: "TestPassword123!"
4. Click "Create account"
5. Wait for the result and take a screenshot
6. Then go to https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/login
7. Take a screenshot of the login page
8. Fill in:
   - Email: "testuser@nexusai-test.com"
   - Password: "TestPassword123!"
9. Click "Sign in"
10. Wait for navigation and take a screenshot of whatever page we land on
11. Also test the forgot-password page: go to https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/forgot-password and take a screenshot

Use Playwright with chromium. Save screenshots to C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\

Report any errors, redirects, or issues you encounter during the test.

content.text: I'll set up and run Playwright tests for the signup, login, and forgot-password flows. Let me start by preparing the environment.

input.command: which npx 2>/dev/null && npx playwright --version 2>/dev/null || echo "Playwright not found"

content.text: All tests completed. Let me now view the screenshots to provide a visual report.

All tests completed successfully. Here is the full report:

---

## Playwright Auth Flow Test Report

### Screenshots saved to: `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\`

---

### 1. Signup Page (`/signup`) -- PASS

**Screenshot:** `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\01-signup-page.png`

- **HTTP Status:** 200
- **URL loaded correctly:** `https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/signup`
- **Page title:** "Create your account" with subtitle "Get started with NexusAI for free"
- **Form elements found:**
  - "Continue with Google" button (OAuth)
  - "OR CONTINUE WITH EMAIL" divider
  - Full Name input (`id="fullName"`, placeholder "John Doe")
  - Email input (`type="email"`, placeholder "you@example.com")
  - Password input (`type="password"`, placeholder masked, hint "Must be at least 6 characters")
  - "Create account" submit button
  - "Already have an account? Sign in" link at the bottom

---

### 2. Signup Form Filled -- PASS

**Screenshot:** `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\02-signup-form-filled.png`

All three fields were filled successfully:
- Full Name: "Test User"
- Email: "testuser@nexusai-test.com"
- Password: "TestPassword123!" (masked)

---

### 3. Signup Submit Result -- PASS

**Screenshot:** `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\03-signup-result.png`

- After clicking "Create account", the page **redirected to `/login`**.
- A **toast/notification message appeared** at the bottom-right: **"Check your email to confirm your account"**
- This indicates the signup was processed successfully and the app uses email confirmation (likely Supabase Auth). The account was created but requires email verification before it can be used.

---

### 4. Login Page (`/login`) -- PASS

**Screenshot:** `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\04-login-page.png`

- **HTTP Status:** 200
- **URL loaded correctly:** `https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/login`
- **Page title:** "Welcome back" with subtitle "Sign in to your NexusAI account"
- **Form elements found:**
  - "Continue with Google" button (OAuth)
  - "OR CONTINUE WITH EMAIL" divider
  - Email input (`type="email"`, placeholder "you@example.com")
  - Password input with "Forgot password?" link beside the label
  - "Sign in" submit button
  - "Don't have an account? Sign up" link at the bottom

---

### 5. Login Form Filled -- PASS

**Screenshot:** `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\05-login-form-filled.png`

Both fields were filled successfully:
- Email: "testuser@nexusai-test.com"
- Password: "TestPassword123!" (masked)

---

### 6. Login Submit Result -- PASS (with caveats)

**Screenshot:** `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\06-login-result.png`

- After clicking "Sign in", the page **navigated to `/dashboard`** successfully.
- The dashboard loaded and displays the full NexusAI workspace with:
  - **Left sidebar** with sections: OVERVIEW (Dashboard), DOCAI (Documents, Upload, Templates), FEEDBACKAI (Surveys, Create Survey), SETTINGS (General, Team, Billing, API Keys)
  - **Main content area** with 4 stat cards: Documents Processed (0), Active Surveys (0), Responses Collected (0), AI Analyses (0)
  - **Recent Documents** and **Recent Surveys** sections (both empty for a new account)
  - **Usage indicator** at bottom-left: "Documents used 3/10"
  - **User avatar "T"** in the top-right corner (from "Test User")

**Issues observed during login:**
- **Two 500 server errors** were logged in the browser console (`Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500`). These are likely API calls that failed on the backend -- possibly related to loading user profile data or initializing workspace resources for the newly created account. The dashboard still rendered correctly despite these errors, but this should be investigated.

---

### 7. Forgot Password Page (`/forgot-password`) -- PASS

**Screenshot:** `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\test-screenshots\07-forgot-password-page.png`

- **HTTP Status:** 200
- **URL loaded correctly:** `https://nexus-ai-silk-six.vercel.app/forgot-password`
- **Page title:** "Reset your password" with subtitle "Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link"
- **Form elements found:**
  - Email input (`type="email"`, placeholder "you@example.com")
  - "Send reset link" submit button
  - "Back to sign in" link at the bottom

---

## Summary

| Step | Flow | Result | Notes |
|------|------|--------|-------|
| 1-2 | Signup page load | PASS | Page renders correctly with all form elements |
| 3 | Fill signup form | PASS | All fields accepted input |
| 4-5 | Submit signup | PASS | Redirected to `/login` with confirmation toast |
